The Beta card is the second card in the first row.
Its boundaries appear to be roughly:
x from ~268 to ~500
y from ~185 to ~368

The Beta card:

Bottom-right corner: (500, 368)

The previous click was at (383, 277), which is very close to the center. If it was outside, maybe the card is smaller or the target is more specific.
